title: Professional Caulk Gun Kit with Caulk Remover Tool & Putty Knife - 5 in 1 Caulking Tool Set for Caulking Removal, Shower & Bathroom Caulk, Includes Caulking Gun Tool, Caulk Scraper Tool Spackle Knife
features: 【Comfortable Grip】 Lightweight design with a rotating barrel reaches tight corner. Ergonomic grip reduces fatigue during grout removal or caulking projects, creating smooth silicone caulk lines

【Convinent & Hassle-free】 Attached dried caulk remover needle and spout cutter can open the caulking tube and clear clogged adhesive easily after caulk removal tool. Drip-free design keeps the site spotless—no leaks or spills

【Professional Sealant Tool】 Intergrated 5 functions in 1, this caulking tool with muti-angle finishing tool meets most of the caulking needs. Stainless steel caulk scraper handles toughest grout removal jobs
【Whole-Home Versatility】 It's suitable for almost critical sealing zones, e.g., kitchen sink caulking, washroom, toilet, window/door,bathtub caulk, making your house look as good as new
【Ultimate Value Bundle】 From simple caulk removal to full sealant caulking projects, this silicone gun with that silicone tool does it all. Achieve durable seals as easily as possible
description: Product Description Seal Puncture Pin Clear the blockage and break the internal freshness seal Spout Cutter Cut the nozzle and open the sealant easily Hanging Rope and Hook Suitable for different storage methods Sturdy Material Iron push bar and thick steel frame make it more durable
